description: Create a content slide with a full-width horizontal timeline of major technology and labor milestones from 1760 to 2035, shown as a multi-era process flow with historical events, current AI developments, and future projections.

header.kicker: Technology Vision 2025 | AI: A Declaration of Autonomy
header.headline: The New Learning Loop

steps.label: The Industrial Revolution starts a shift from an agrarian and handicraft economy to machine manufacturing
75% of the U.S. paid labor force is in agriculture
The U.S. census incorporates tabulators, cutting calculation time from seven to three years
Henry Ford installs the first moving assembly line for cars
IBM releases the IBM Magnetic Tape/Selectric Typewriter, transforming desk work
Steve Jobs likens the personal computer to a bicycle—machines that amplify people's abilities
Netscape Navigator is released and transforms how people access information
2% of the U.S. paid labor force is in agriculture
OpenAI unveils GPT-3, which has abilities like writing code
Microsoft launches Microsoft 365 Copilot, calling it “the most powerful productivity tool on the planet”
75% of knowledge workers have employer-provided generative AI tools
A major company starts a program to reward employees for automating tasks
More than half of Fortune 500 companies have autonomous supply chain management systems
Unions and construction companies reach an agreement on using human-robot teams in Europe
Most industries see profit-per-employee double over the last decade
